sections.name: AntMatutinumM
lines: Declare his glory among the Gentiles: * his wonders among all people. ;;95
His right hand hath wrought for him salvation, * and his arm is holy, alleluia;;97
I walked in the innocence of my heart, * in the midst of my house;;100
Be glad and rejoice, for your names are written in heaven, said the Lord;;253;254;255

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. They were without blame before the Lord and were not divided from each other.
* They drank from the Lord's chalice and were made friends of God.
V. They handed their bodies to chastisement for the sake of God and therefore they are crowned and accept the palm.
R. They drank from the Lord's chalice and were made friends of God.

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. You will make them princes over all the earth. They shall remember your name
* Throughout all generations.
V. Your friends, O God, are made exceedingly honourable: their principality is exceedingly strengthened.
R. Throughout all generations.

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. Who are these, that fly as clouds,
* And as doves to their windows?
V. Their sound has gone forth into all the earth: and their words unto the ends of the world.
R. And as doves to their windows?

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. There are no speeches nor languages, where their voices are not heard.
* Their sound has gone forth into all the earth: and their words to the ends of the world.
V. Your friends O Lord are made exceedingly honourable: their principality is exceedingly strengthened.
R. Their sound has gone forth into all the earth: and their words to the ends of the world.
